name: RWBY: Shattered Aura
description:
Step into the world of Remnant like never before. This interactive RPG system turns Janitor AI into your personal Game Master, narrating your journey through a fully realized RWBY universe.

Create your own original character—be they student, Huntsman, rogue, or relic of the past—and shape your story through immersive roleplay, tactical combat, and world-shifting decisions. Encounter familiar faces, face deadly Grimm, uncover secrets, and decide the fate of kingdoms.

Whether you're exploring Beacon as a new student, leading a rogue team through the wilds, or rewriting the legacy of heroes, this bot brings the action, heart, and danger of RWBY to life in rich, narrative-driven detail.

Please leave a review so I can keep improving it.
creator: Delor317
